item.title: Twilight of the ‘Cougar’
item.description: Recent depictions of May-December relationships are challenging cliché notions about women who date younger men.
item.dc:creator: Anna Holmes

item.title: Don’t Mess With the Housewives of Ukraine
item.description: My interview with a tank maker provoked fury and memes—including from Zelensky.
item.dc:creator: Simon Shuster

item.title: What the Birthright Case Is Really About
item.description: Do we want to be the America of John C. Calhoun or Frederick Douglass?
item.dc:creator: Adam Serwer

item.title: The Manosphere Feels Betrayed
item.description: The Epstein files, Alex Pretti, now Iran?
item.dc:creator: Hanna Rosin

item.title: Trump’s Cozy Transportation Secretary
item.description: Sean Duffy is partnering with the industries he regulates in new ways.
item.dc:creator: Michael Scherer

item.title: The Intellectual Right Is Mad at the Mess It’s Made
item.description: Conservatives are criticizing influencers for going too far.
item.dc:creator: Ali Breland

item.title: A Private Company Wants to Block the Sun, Responsibly
item.description: Stardust sold geoengineering to investors. Now it needs to sell it to the public.
item.dc:creator: Alexander C. Kaufman

item.title: Hitler’s Edifice Complex
item.description: He was obsessed with adding an expensive new wing to the Reich Chancellery, part of his grandiose architectural ambitions for the nation’s capital.
item.dc:creator: Timothy W. Ryback

item.title: We’re AllReal HousewivesNow
item.description: Bravo’s signature reality-TV show is a shorthand for a certain flavor of petty drama—and a way that many people now live.
item.dc:creator: Michael Waters

item.title: Young People Are Falling Behind, but Not Because of AI
item.description: The case that AI is already stealing young people’s jobs is based on a statistical mirage.
item.dc:creator: Rogé Karma

item.title: The Album That Made Me Fall Back in Love With Heavy Metal
item.description: Neurosis’s new record makes the right kind of noise to stand out in this overwhelming moment.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kornhaber

item.title: How the Left Accidentally Bolstered the Nativist Right
item.description: By dismissing the distinction between legal and illegal immigration as bogus, advocates signaled that they would not defend it.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Kustov

item.title: Maybe Trump Should Not Have Given This Speech
item.description: His address raised more questions than it answered about the war in Iran.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: Why Doesn’t Anybody Realize We’re Going Back to the Moon?
item.description: On the ground at the Trump era’s most important space launch
item.dc:creator: Ross Andersen

item.title: Trump’s Absurd Citizenship Arguments Went Nowhere
item.description: The scandal is that the case got this far.
item.dc:creator: Quinta Jurecic

item.title: Public Anger Is Rising
item.description: Even TMZ is channeling the national discontent.
item.dc:creator: Yvonne Wingett Sanchez

item.title: What Tracy Kidder Stood For
item.description: His deep, immersive writing had moral stakes and changed people’s lives.
item.dc:creator: Cullen Murphy

item.title: I Am Here to Watch the Birthright-Citizenship Arguments, but Not in a Threatening Way
item.description: Can’t a president go watch his justices?
item.dc:creator: Alexandra Petri

item.title: Today’sAtlanticTrivia: Computer Games
item.description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
item.dc:creator: Drew Goins

item.title: TV’s Failing Cure for Middle-Aged Malaise
item.description: Crime-solving housewives have become less compelling.
item.dc:creator: Shirley Li
